title: Colored Ropes
body:
# Colored Ropes

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/572fd67aac99a71ebbaeddb4f507e1158cf6a9cd_0.webp)

This mod adds colored ropes that can be used for climbing and descending vertical spaces. Unlike ladders, ropes can hang freely without touching walls, making them especially useful for exploring caves or creating alternative paths.

### Features:
- **Climbing and Descending:** Ropes allow safe vertical movement up and down walls.
- **Extendable Ropes:** Place a rope at any point and extend it downward without needing to climb.
- **Attachment Options:** Ropes can be attached to walls or ceilings.
- **Customizable Appearance:** Ropes can be dyed in different colors and made to glow for improved visibility.
- **Removal with Shears:** Cut a rope with shears to safely return it to your inventory.
- **Rope Coil:** A special item that places 8 ropes at once, saving inventory space and speeding up placement.
- **Rope Arrows:** Special arrows allow you to place ropes at the location they hit, making it easier to reach distant or hard-to-access spots.

### Crafting:
- **Ropes:** Can be crafted from 4 pieces of colored wool to produce 8 ropes.
- **Recoloring Ropes:** Combine 8 ropes of any color with a dye to change their color.
- **Glowing Ropes:** Combine 8 ropes of any color with glowstone dust to make them emit light.
- **Rope Coil:** Crafted from 8 ropes of any color.
- **Rope Arrow:** Crafted from 1 arrow and 2 rope coils.
